title: LearningObject
description: Canonical schema for a single vocabulary/language item in Kids Brain v1. Every item in the curriculum database must conform to this schema.

word.description: Base form of the target word or phrase

word_type.description: Grammatical category. Used internally only — never surfaced to child.

forms.description: All forms the child may encounter or produce

sentence_frames.description: Interaction frames — NOT grammar rules. These are the patterns used in question generation and production tasks.

level.description: Which curriculum level introduced this frame

tpr_gesture.description: Animation key for Total Physical Response gesture. Maps to animation library. Example: 'mime_stroking_cat', 'jump_action', 'eating_mime'

visual_cue_id.description: ID of the associated image/visual in the asset library. Frontend fetches this.

sound_cue_id.description: ID of associated audio cue (animal sound, action sound, word sound effect). Used in Rescue Ladder Level 3.

audio_model_id.description: ID of pre-recorded teacher pronunciation model for this word. Used for phonics support.

difficulty.description: Relative difficulty for target age range. 1=very easy (cat, dog), 5=harder (butterfly, crocodile)

semantic_cluster.description: IDs of semantically related items. Used for forced-choice distractors and co-occurrence in sessions.

l1_translations.description: L1 anchor words for Rescue Ladder Level 4. Single word only — no sentences.

interaction_modes.description: All interaction modes available for this item. Used by Mode Tracker to ensure varied repetition across 7+ modes.

description_of_modes.point_recognition: Child points to image — no speech required
description_of_modes.yes_no: Teacher names item, child confirms yes/no
description_of_modes.forced_choice: Two options presented, child picks one
description_of_modes.chorus_production: Teacher and child say it together
description_of_modes.tpr_action: Child performs physical action associated with word
description_of_modes.story_context: Word appears in a narrative context

rescue_ladder_scripts.description: Item-specific scripts for each level of the Rescue Ladder. Pre-authored. Fills in at runtime.

level_1.description: Paralinguistic scaffold — what teacher says with emphasis. Use {word}.

level_2.description: Visual scaffold — stripped-down pointing script. Use {word}.

level_3.description: Sound/mime script — incorporate sound cue and mime. Use {word} and {sound_cue}.

story_context.description: How this item appears in the unit narrative. Optional for MVP.

character.description: Which story character uses/encounters this item

scene_summary.description: One-sentence description of when this word appears in the story

session_introduced.description: Session number within the unit where this item is first introduced via story

recycled_in_units.description: Unit numbers where this item recurs (spiral curriculum). Used by spaced repetition scheduler.

prerequisite_items.description: IDs of items that should be acquired before this one is introduced.

tags.description: Flexible tagging for content filtering and session planning.

sentence_frames.example: What is it? It's a cat.

rescue_ladder_scripts.level_1: It's a BIG cat! Look — CAT!
rescue_ladder_scripts.level_3: Meow! A cat! CAT! What animal?

story_context.scene_summary: Luna appears in the forest and Milo needs to name her
